user.title: Setup Boiler Controller
user.description: Select your power sensor and provide the Shelly device details.

power_sensor.title: Select Power Sensor
power_sensor.description: Choose the sensor that provides current power consumption/production data (in Watts)

shelly_config.title: Configure Shelly Device
shelly_config.description: Enter the Shelly URL or IP address. If you started this flow from a discovered device we will pre-fill the field for you (e.g. {example_url1} or {example_url2}).

error.no_power_sensors: No power sensors found in Home Assistant
error.entity_not_found: The selected entity was not found
error.no_dimmer_entities: No light or input_number entities found in Home Assistant
error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach the Shelly device
error.cannot_identify: Unable to read the Shelly device identity
error.device_in_use: This Shelly device is already configured

abort.unsupported_device: The discovered device is not a supported Shelly dimmer

init.title: Boiler Controller Options
init.description: Switch the power sensor or Shelly device used by this controller

data.change_devices: Change power sensor or Shelly settings

power_sensor.title: Select New Power Sensor
power_sensor.description: Choose a new sensor that provides current power consumption/production data (in Watts)

shelly_config.title: Update Shelly Settings
shelly_config.description: Adjust the Shelly URL. If the device was discovered previously, the current URL is shown here.
